name: python3-pyqt5.qtchart
title: python3-pyqt5.qtchart
summary: Python 3 bindings for Qt5's Charts module
description:
Python 3 bindings for Qt5's Charts module
The Charts module of PyQt5 provides widgets and utility classes
for chart rendering in a PyQt5 application.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of this module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt5.qtchart because Python 3 bindings for Qt5's Charts module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt5.qtchart as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt5.qtchart with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt5.qtchart --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
